questions: what to do for insect bites
poka makorer kamor e ki korbo
answers: For most insect bites: wash the area with soap and water, apply ice to reduce swelling, use anti-itch cream (calamine or hydrocortisone), and take antihistamine if needed. Watch for allergic reactions.
Poka kamrale shabu pani diye dhun, borf lagayen, ar calamine lotion ba anti-itch cream use korun. Beshi fulte thakle ba breathing problem hole hospital jan — severe allergy hote pare.

Bee sting treatment: Remove the stinger by scraping (don't squeeze), wash with soap and water, apply ice, take antihistamine. If you experience difficulty breathing or swelling of face/throat, call 999 immediately.
Poka makorer kamor theke bachte repellent spray use korun, full sleeve kapor porun baire gele, ar mosquito net use korun rate. Bite hole na chulkiye try korun — infection hote pare.
